metadata.title: Castlery
metadata.description: Castlery is an online furniture store in Singapore that provides a wide range of modern and high-quality furniture.
metadata.keywords: furniture Singapore, online furniture Singapore, furniture shop Singapore, furniture stores Singapore, furniture in Singapore, modern furniture Singapore, furniture SG, furniture, Castlery, Singapore

variables.title: # Variables
variables.description: Use Variables to pass in values to the translation file.

currency.title: # Currency Demos
currency.description: The number of decimal places is 0-2, which is automatically processed globally without manual restriction.

pluralization.title: # Pluralization
pluralization.description: The pluralization is automatically processed globally without manual restriction.
pluralization.quantity: You have {count, plural, =0 {no items} =1 {one item} other {# items}} in your cart.

conditional.title: # Conditionals
conditional.description: Using conditionals in translations is a powerful way to handle different states and scenarios.
conditional.status: {status, select, pending {Pending} processing {Processing} shipped {Shipped} delivered {Delivered} other {Unknown}}
conditional.notification: {type, select, success {Success!} error {Error occurred} warning {Warning} info {Information} other {Notification}}

cartCheckoutZipcodeSelector.title: Shipping location
cartCheckoutZipcodeSelector.description: Enter your location postal code to get an accurate estimate shipping information.

main.title: ECO Delivery — Partnership with Maersk
main.description: We are committed to adopting low-GHG fuel options. To date, we have successfully reduced ocean freight emissions by 5,000 metric tons. Over the next decade, we aim to further reduce carbon emissions by at least 1,000 metric tons per year, in collaboration with Maersk.​

whatThisMeansForYou.title: What This Means for You
whatThisMeansForYou.description: Your Castlery order will support the transition to green fuels and reduce GHG emissions at no extra cost to you.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: For our shipments, Maersk replaces fossil fuels on its ships with green fuels* like green methanol or second-generation biodiesel based on waste feedstocks. The amount of carbon savings is calculated based on the energy used to move the containers, as reported by Maersk and verified by 3rd parties from Smart Freight Centre.

ecoDelivery.readMoreLinkText: Read more about Maersk ECO Delivery.
ecoDelivery.tip: Maersk defines ‘green fuels’ as fuels with low (65-80%) to very low (80-95%) GHG emissions over their life cycle compared to fossil fuels
